headlines.title: Iran Offers Plan to Focus on Strait of Hormuz and Delay Nuclear Talks
headlines.summary: In its latest offer delivered on Sunday, Iran proposed opening the key waterway to shipping traffic and lifting the U.S. blockade, while postponing the thornier nuclear issue until later.

headlines.title: Canada Says Its Gold Is Traceable and Clean. So We Traced It.
headlines.summary: We ended up in a Colombian mine controlled by a drug cartel.

headlines.title: Mali Terror Attack: Defense Minister Killed by Al Qaeda-Linked JNIM
headlines.summary: The death of the defense minister, Gen. Sadio Camara, a central figure in the country’s military government, comes amid escalating violence in the region.

headlines.title: Carney to Launch Sovereign Wealth Fund to Distance Canada’s Economy From U.S.
headlines.summary: The sovereign wealth fund announced by Prime Minister Mark Carney will be far smaller than ones in other oil producers like Norway and the Middle East.

headlines.title: Canada’s New Route to Citizenship Has Thousands of Americans Lining Up to Apply
headlines.summary: Canada has opened a route to citizenship for people who can prove they have a Canada-born ancestor. Millions could qualify, and Americans are already lining up to apply.

headlines.title: Italy extradites alleged Chinese cyber-espionage suspect to US
Five killed in train crash near Indonesia’s Jakarta; rescue efforts ongoing
US reviews Iran peace plan as dozens of nations call for Hormuz to reopen
US Supreme Court reinstates Republican-favoured Texas electoral map
Bahrain strips 69 people of citizenship over Iran support
South Carolina's measles outbreak is over. But more are brewing around the country
headlines.summary: The virus infected nearly 1,000 people in the state before the state declared it over. Meanwhile, cases are spreading across many parts of the U.S., with more than 20 outbreaks currently active.

headlines.title: Supreme Court heard case on how to label risks of popular weed killer
headlines.summary: How the Supreme Court rules could have implications for tens of thousands of lawsuits against Roundup maker Monsanto, which is now owned by Bayer.

headlines.title: Privacy and law enforcement clash as the Supreme Court wrestles with 'geofence' warrants
headlines.summary: In oral arguments at the Supreme Court Monday, most of the justices aimed pointed questions at both sides, with the usual conservative-liberal alignments scrambled like an egg.

headlines.title: Here's a look inside security at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner
headlines.summary: Saturday's shooting at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner raised questions about how close the alleged gunman got to the president and what the Secret Service security looked like.

headlines.title: Melania Trump wants ABC to 'take a stand' against Jimmy Kimmel after 'hateful' joke
headlines.summary: Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."

headlines.title: Ukraine marks 40 years of Chernobyl disaster
headlines.summary: SLAVUTYCH, Ukraine — People streamed into the central square of Slavutych in the early hours of Sunday, placing candles on a large radiation hazard symbol laid out on the ground as a midnight commemoration began for those killed in the Chernobyl disaster 40 years ago and the thousands who risked deadly radiation exposure to contain its aftermath.

headlines.title: US shooting bares security vulnerabilities
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON — The shooting on Saturday night of a Secret Service agent at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner raises questions yet again about security at a time of increased political violence.

headlines.title: Germany, France push for Hormuz navigation
headlines.summary: As Germany prepares to send naval ships to the Mediterranean Sea, French President Emmanuel Macron has renewed his push to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, amid a warning from the chief of energy company TotalEnergies that a prolonged Iran war could trigger global energy shortages.

headlines.title: King 'should meet Epstein survivors' in US
headlines.summary: Britain's King Charles III has been urged to meet the survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's sexual abuse during his visit to the United States this week.

headlines.title: East meets West in music event held at Chinese Embassy
headlines.summary: With the delicate fragrance of incense and the ancient resonance of the guqin , the Chinese Embassy in Washington was transformed into an immersive cultural space on Friday evening. The Tea for Harmony: East Meets West in Music event brought together over 200 guests to experience the "Four Arts of Life" — tea ceremony, incense burning, flower arrangement and hanging scroll paintings — before an innovative concert that bridged Eastern and Western traditions.

headlines.title: Amid fresh unrest, Home Secretary reviews Manipur security situation
headlines.summary: Home Secretary reviews Manipur's security amid unrest, addressing ethnic violence and the impact of police force withdrawals.

headlines.title: Ladakh groups seek meeting with Shah and steps to build trust
headlines.summary: Ladakh groups urge Home Minister Shah for dialogue and trust-building ahead of his April 30 visit, demanding statehood and case withdrawals.

headlines.title: Govt. says Chabahar issue being discussed with Iran, U.S.
headlines.summary: India discusses Chabahar port operations with Iran and the U.S. as sanctions waiver expires, exploring potential exit options.

headlines.title: 12-storey-high bridge being built over Sabarmati for bullet train project
headlines.summary: A 12-storey-high bridge over the Sabarmati is under construction for the Mumbai-Ahmedabad bullet train project, ensuring water flow continuity.

headlines.title: ₹127.69 crore has been restored to victims of Rose Valley Group scam: ED
headlines.summary: ED restores ₹127.69 crore to victims of the Rose Valley Group scam, with ongoing efforts to expedite further disbursements.
